description: Evidence-grounded AI-assisted workflow for transforming current issues into Quran-centred short-form dakwah media under mandatory human review. Sources: approved QUL downloaded datasets (Quran, translation, tafsir, topics) and human-assisted SemakHadis.com verification. Evidence first, reflection second, publication only after human review.
ownerBoundary: assess current issues for reflective dakwah content
map human issues to Islamic themes
retrieve Quran and tafsir evidence from approved QUL datasets
record optional hadith verification from Semak Hadis
validate scripts against evidence and safety rules
guardrails: Arabic Quran text must come from the configured QUL dataset.
AI must not invent a Quran reference, translation, tafsir quotation, hadith, source, or news fact.
AI thematic matching is advisory and must be verified by a human.
No hadith may appear in a final script while verification is pending.
AI must not claim that a modern event is the direct reason for revelation of an ayah.
AI must not claim that a disaster or tragedy is divine punishment.
Religious review and editorial publication approval are mandatory and separate.
The pack must not publish automatically in v1.

verification.manifest: draft — Phase A skeleton per QMCP Blueprint V1.0, not yet reviewed by eff
verification.runtime: 12/13 executors implemented (Phase B deterministic evidence nodes + Phase C AI editorial nodes, wired to ReligiousSourceService/AiService in apps/api/src/execution/real-nodes/index.ts per QMCP Volume 2). discover_current_issues remains an honest stub — RESEARCH_SERVICE_NOT_CONFIGURED — until Phase D's current-issue-research module exists. Not yet typechecked/tested on a live install (sandbox cross-mount symlink limitation — pending eff's Windows pnpm build:packs/typecheck/test pass).
verification.templates: draft — issue-to-dakwah-video descriptor plus an importable graph body wiring the main chain with the three human gates; hadith verification and Video Production handoff nodes are standalone examples (see templates/README.md); not yet sanity-checked with a real import + trigger
